docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIOS, REFUGIO AS TO DEFENDANT ORTEGA, JUAN AN INDIVIDUAL DBA J & J CLEANING SERVICE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
